fixed_target.description: Ask exactly N questions chosen from the 400-question bank.
runtimeFlow: Replace up to rebalanceSwapLimit questions if needed.

adaptive_confidence.description: Ask a variable number of questions until the model is confident enough to stop.
runtimeFlow: Ask a broad balanced core set first.
Score provisional builds every 5 questions after the minimum threshold.
Measure build confidence, trait stability, and cluster coverage.
If uncertainty remains, serve targeted disambiguation questions.
Stop when thresholds are met or maxQuestions is reached.

corePhase.formula: coreQuestionCount = max(15, ceil(targetQuestionCount * 0.60)) in fixed mode; 24 in adaptive mode
corePhase.goal: Establish a broad personality + fantasy + playstyle signature before specialization.

refinementPhase.goal: Differentiate between close classes, subclasses, or opposed trait pairs.

nearDuplicatePolicy.behavior: Never serve two questions from the same similarityGroup in one session when that metadata exists.

notes: topBuildMargin compares the winning build score to the runner-up
traitStability estimates how much the normalized trait profile changes over the last several questions
coverage measures whether enough clusters and opposed pairs have been meaningfully sampled
subclassClarity captures whether the subclass result is clearly ahead of sibling subclasses
